title: Add CI to test podman with Kata-Containers
body:
As discussed in the last crio meeting. It will be useful to have a CI job to test podman with Kata-Containers, similar to what we have in crio today. This will help validate Kata with the latest podman release.

cc @chavafg

comments.body:
as a pre-req, can you guys produce a how-to kata and podman to make this something that we can try and understand?  

and then, as for the ci, are you talking about your CI or ours? 

if the latter, we'd love to evaluate any PRs you want to submit.
